name: @santex/ollama-spaceship-sdk
description: Complete reference for every module in `src/apis/`.   The entry points are **`client.ts`** (low-level singleton) and **`ClientLibrary.ts`** (high-level class wrapper).

scripts.pub: npm run docs; echo '<meta http-equiv="refresh" content="0; url=./docs/index.html" />' >index.html;
scripts.backend: cd data && python3 -m venv venv; ./venv/bin/pip3 install -r requirements.txt;
scripts.ingest: cd data && for j in *json; do i=$(echo "$j" | sed 's/.json//' | tr [A-Z] [a-z]); ./venv/bin/python3 ./import.py --url http://127.0.0.1:9200 --file "$j" --index "prompt-hub-$i"; done
scripts.docs: cp  -r images dist/; npx typedoc --customCss ./images/style.css --entryPoints src --entryPointStrategy expand --out docs --tsconfig tsconfig.test.json --skipErrorChecking
